message:
style: cargo clippy --fix + cargo fmt sweep on indexer paths

Two clean clippy/fmt passes batched together:

- src/indexer/semantic.rs: four &index_path → index_path borrow
  removals in create_and_write_vector_index / append_to_vector_index
  (clippy::needless_borrow). The inner function signatures already
  take &Path, so passing a &PathBuf doubled the borrow.

- src/indexer/mod.rs:
  * LexicalRebuildEquivalenceAccumulator::commit dropped two
    `.into_iter()` calls on Vecs inside zip chains (clippy::
    useless_into_iter — zip already consumes by value).
  * Two format!/transition_build lines reformatted: format! fit on a
    single line after manifest_now_ms:016x braced interpolation, and
    the transition_build call got the standard multi-arg wrap shape.

No semantic changes; pure lint/fmt output.
